etymology.description: semantic 土(土) (tǔ, "earth; soil") + phonetic 圥(圥) (lù) -> continent; land
etymology.interpretation: The character 坴 combines 土(土) (tǔ, "earth; soil") as the semantic component indicating a connection to land or soil, with 圥(圥) (lù) as the phonetic component providing the sound. This suggests an expansive area of land or territory due to the association with earth.
